anomalies.insight: Jaipur Lipid Profile up 1,275% week-on-week (55 vs 4 same Wednesday last week) — 11.8σ above range. Last Wednesday had almost zero Jaipur Lipid Profile demand. A new B2B health camp cycle has clearly been established in Jaipur this week that did not exist last Wednesday. This is a new revenue source — B2B team to formalise the client relationship and ensure this becomes a recurring Wednesday engagement.

Jaipur B2B up 950% week-on-week (63 vs 6 same Wednesday) — 9.2σ above range. The weekly comparison confirms Jaipur B2B is entirely new this week — not a rebound from last week. A new corporate or institutional client has been onboarded in Jaipur. Document urgently and assess whether similar camps can be scheduled in nearby Tier-2 cities (Kota, Udaipur, Ajmer).

B2B/Others nationally up 15.6% week-on-week (2,085 vs 1,804 same Wednesday) — 1.7σ above range — contributing 108% of total weekly growth. B2B growing faster than any other channel week-on-week confirms the channel is accelerating. Identify the top 5 B2B accounts driving this week-on-week growth for leadership review.

Jaipur city up 51% week-on-week (235 vs 156 same Wednesday) — 3.7σ above range. Jaipur has gone from a mid-tier city to one of the highest growth contributors this week. Driven by B2B but the city overall is growing — check whether organic demand (App/web, Telesales) in Jaipur is also recovering, or if the growth is entirely B2B-dependent.

Vizag 12:00 slot up 263% week-on-week (29 vs 8 same Wednesday) — 10.3σ above range. Vizag is showing a new Wednesday midday demand pattern that was not present last week. A new B2B client or Pickup Point in Vizag appears to have activated this week. Ops team to document and ensure supply capacity.

Jaipur 17:00 slot up 225% week-on-week (39 vs 12 same Wednesday) — 6.8σ above range. The weekly confirmation of Jaipur's afternoon B2B camp activity — it was not present last Wednesday. If the camp runs next Wednesday, ops should pre-position phlebotomists in Jaipur from 15:00 onwards.

Pune B2B up 92% week-on-week (125 vs 65 same Wednesday) — 2.8σ above range. Pune B2B has nearly doubled week-on-week — a sustained trend. This is not a one-day spike — multiple Wednesday data points now confirm Pune B2B is growing. Identify the top Pune B2B accounts and assess whether dedicated Pune corporate wellness ops capacity is needed.

Kolkata Truworth up 178% week-on-week (75 vs 27 same Wednesday) — 3σ above range. Truworth has tripled its Kolkata volume week-on-week. The Truworth account manager should be alerted — this may indicate a new Kolkata corporate employer has been added to the Truworth network.

Kolkata TW-EYGDS HC up 243% week-on-week (72 vs 21 same Wednesday) — 2.8σ above range. The Truworth package growth in Kolkata is concentrated in this specific SKU, confirming a structured Truworth wellness programme. Ensure reagent and reporting capacity for TW-EYGDS HC in Kolkata is adequate for recurring Wednesday volumes.

Mumbai 18:00 slot up 42% week-on-week (88 vs 62 same Wednesday) — 5.3σ above range. Mumbai evening demand consistently growing week-on-week confirms this is not a one-day spike. A recurring Wednesday evening notification or B2B pattern is driving this. Check notification logs and B2B orders for Mumbai Wednesday evenings.

Lipid Profile via B2B up 77% week-on-week (83 vs 47 same Wednesday) — 2.6σ above range. The weekly growth in B2B Lipid Profile is sustained — Jaipur is the primary driver but other cities may also be contributing. B2B ops to track which cities are driving fasting test orders on Wednesdays and ensure morning collection slots are pre-allocated.

Pune Truworth up 59% week-on-week (73 vs 46 same Wednesday) — 3.2σ above range. Both Pune and Kolkata Truworth are growing strongly week-on-week simultaneously — Truworth appears to have activated new corporate clients in multiple cities this week. Truworth account manager to provide a briefing on new client activations.

Jaipur CBC up 154% week-on-week (33 vs 13 same Wednesday) — 4.2σ above range. CBC and Lipid Profile both spiking in Jaipur on the same day confirms a multi-test health camp. The B2B team should review the test mix of the Jaipur camp — if CBC + Lipid Profile is a standard package, this should be formally catalogued as a reusable wellness camp product.

Hyderabad App/web down 16% week-on-week (437 vs 517 same Wednesday) — 1σ below range. While Hyderabad is declining overall today (−44 vs Tuesday), the weekly comparison confirms App/web weakness in Hyderabad is a sustained trend. Check if App/web slot availability, search ranking, or featured placements in Hyderabad have changed in the last 7 days.

Jaipur 16:00 slot up 133% week-on-week (21 vs 9 same Wednesday) — 6.5σ above range. All four Jaipur afternoon hour signals (16:00, 17:00) are above range both day-on-day and week-on-week, confirming a structured afternoon camp schedule. Ops team to formalise a recurring Wednesday afternoon Jaipur camp model.
